cpu_cores.title: CPUs
cpu_cores.description: Number of CPUs to use for processing

library_name.title: Library Name
library_name.description: Library name for the read group LB tag. Applied to all samples. If not provided, defaults to the sample name.

sequencing_center.title: Sequencing Center
sequencing_center.description: Sequencing center for the read group CN tag. Applied to all samples. If not provided, defaults to '.'

workflow_failure_mode.title: Workflow Failure Mode
workflow_failure_mode.description: Behavior when individual tasks encounter failures
